title: Facilities Management
description: A focused professional course in Facilities Management designed to build practical capability and confidence through expert-led sessions and real-world case application.
whoShouldAttend: This course is suitable for professionals, team leads, and managers seeking stronger skills in Facilities Management.
outcomes: Understand core principles and current practices in Facilities Management.
Apply practical frameworks to workplace challenges.
Develop an action plan for immediate implementation.

topics.title: Foundations and Core Concepts
bullets: Key terminology and principles in Facilities Management

topics.title: Tools, Methods, and Practice
bullets: Common pitfalls and how to avoid them
